stemHtml:
When planning a flight, you see the following METAR for Cairo, your departure aerodrome.

HECA 030900Z 34005KT 6000 NSC 37/17 Q1005 NOSIG

Complete the following sentence regarding the expected cloud cover at Cairo at this time.

No (1) _____ with a base below a height of (2) _____ above aerodrome level or below the highest minimum sector altitude, whichever is greater, and no (3) _____ at any (4) _____.

options.a: (1) cloud covering more than half the sky, (2) 5000 ft, (3) CB, (4) level
options.c: (1) cloud, (2) 5000 ft, (3) CB or TCU, (4) height
options.d: (1) cloud covering more than half the sky, (2) 6000 ft, (3) CB or TCU, (4) height
